checkoutOrderDetailsStep.datumLesesaalText: Please select a date (processing minimum 2 workdays).
checkoutOrderDetailsStep.invalidDate: The reading room is not open on this day. Please select a valid date.

checkoutSubmittedStep.cartText: You still have open orders in your shopping cart.
checkoutSubmittedStep.checkStatusText: You can monitor the status of your order in your user account.
checkoutSubmittedStep.disclaimerText: The video call will be recorded but the recording will be deleted once identification is complete. The Federal Archives will store only a copy of the identification document, the photograph and the user information in tabular form. You may request information about your stored data at any time (Art. 8 FADP).
checkoutSubmittedStep.thxTextDigi: Thank you for your order. You will receive an offer by e-mail.
checkoutSubmittedStep.thxTextEischtisgesuch: We will forward your request to the office responsible. The processing of requests for access can take up to 4 weeks.
checkoutSubmittedStep.thxTextEischtisgesuchAnmeldenUndIndentif: If your request is approved, you will need to identify yourself in order to consult the documents (see Registration and identification).
checkoutSubmittedStep.thxTextEischtisgesuchIntroduction: Thank you for your request to consult the following documents:
checkoutSubmittedStep.thxTextLesesaal: Thank you for your order. You can consult the requested documents on the selected date in the Reading Room Collections and Archives (Opening hours: Monday to Friday 10 am - 5 pm).
checkoutSubmittedStep.thxTextVerwaltungsausleihe: Thank you for your order. You will receive your documents within one to two working days by post.

simple.intro:
Advanced search

Are you interested in manuscripts, letters or other documents on Max Frisch?
Search our catalog and directly access scanned or genuine digital documents from the records of ETH Zurich, the ETH Board as well as from personal papers and autographs of scientists related to ETH Zurich. Search our catalog. After registration you can submit a request to view the documents. If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact us directly at mfa@library.ethz.ch.

search.standardSearchTeaserText: Start your research with a simple search.

syntaxHelp.fuzzy: Search for similar but not identical words using the fuzzy operator.
syntaxHelp.fuzzyExample: e.g.: in order to find «Universität», «Université», «University» etc. use: Universität~
syntaxHelp.gewichtung: Use ^ to increase the weighting of a word.
syntaxHelp.hochkommas: Place quotation marks around a phrase to search for that exact phrase.
syntaxHelp.minus: Use - in front of a search term to exclude it from the hit list.
syntaxHelp.not: Use NOT to exclude individual terms.
syntaxHelp.or: Use OR between search terms to find all results containing one or other of the search terms.
syntaxHelp.plus: Use  + in front of a search term to make it mandatory in the hit list.
syntaxHelp.proximity: Use proximity searches. The number indicates the maximum number of words between the terms.
syntaxHelp.wildcard: Use * or ? to replace one or more letters (not supported at the start of a word).
